questions.instructionEn: Choose the correct word to complete the sentence.

questions.questionEn: I have one sister, and ___ name is Yuki.

questions.instructionJa: 正しい文を選んでください。
questions.questionJa: どの文が正しいですか。
optionsEn: There is two chairs in the room.

There two chairs are in the room.
